name: CFO Gift Card Request
subject: Quick favor needed — confidential
htmlBody:
Hi,

I need a quick favor. I'm in back-to-back meetings and can't make calls right now. I need you to purchase some Google Play gift cards for a client appreciation gift — this is time-sensitive.

Can you get 5 x $100 Google Play cards from any nearby store? Scratch off the back and email me the codes. I'll reimburse you through expense reports.

Please don't mention this to anyone else — I want it to be a surprise. Can you handle this in the next hour?

Thanks,
James Richardson
Chief Financial Officer

name: CEO Acquisition Confidential
subject: Confidential: Acquisition — do not forward
htmlBody:
Hi,

I'm reaching out directly because this is extremely sensitive. We're in the final stages of a confidential acquisition and our legal team needs a wire transfer processed today before the market opens tomorrow.

Please access the secure transfer portal below and process the payment. Our M&A advisor will be waiting for confirmation.

Access Secure Payment Portal

Do not discuss this with anyone — including your manager. I'll brief the full team after the deal closes. Please confirm you've received this.

Best,
Patricia Chen
Chief Executive Officer
